name: Ed Sheeran
bio: Ed Sheeran's catalog is built for streaming scale because melody-driven pop songs continue to travel across global playlists and long-tail repeat listening.
notable_for: Modern streaming-era songwriting at global scale.
career_highlight: Divide remains one of the defining blockbuster pop albums of the streaming era.

earnings.assumptions: Modeled from extreme streaming scale, songwriter participation, durable global pop playlisting, and licensing value.

ownership.publishing_owner: Writer-side participation appears meaningful because Sheeran is a central songwriter
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No broad catalog sale adjustment is assumed
ownership.notes: Artist-side estimate includes both performer economics and meaningful songwriter-side upside.
